mapper.select: select rav.attr_value_id, av.id, av.name, av.attr_key_id, ak.name as attr_key_name from room_attr_value rav left join attr_value av on rav.attr_value_id = av.id and av.is_deleted=0 left join attr_key ak on av.attr_key_id = ak.id and ak.is_deleted=0 where rav.room_id = #{id} and rav.is_deleted = 0
